qa.user_verbatim_complaint: register AC7 and AC7b in the per-task manifest

out_of_scope_observations.observation: Test file asserts stderr token 'bulk-commit-auth-flag-write' but pretool-bash-safety.sh now emits 'bulk-commit-sentinel-write' (renamed in task 20260526-053746). 3 of 8 tests in this directory fail at runtime (test_ac_01, test_ac_02, test_ac_07b). This is pre-existing staleness documented in cleanliness-inspector-report-20260526-202532.json as out_of_scope/info. Fixing test file assertions is explicitly excluded from this cycle scope ('Won't Have: Updating any test file contents').

manifest.json is untracked in git (status: ??). The file was already untracked at cycle baseline (confirmed in dev report baseline_dirty_snapshot). The 4 ACs make no requirement about git tracking; the BA spec Won't Have section says no global manifest structural changes, and is silent on staging. Untracked state is the same as at task-20260526-052559 close (close-report noted 'manifest.json missing ac-07/ac-07b: non-blocking'). Git staging is not part of this cycle's acceptance criteria.

qa.overall_assessment: PASS. All 4 acceptance criteria satisfied. AC1: active_tests length == 8 confirmed. AC2: ac-07 entry fields all match spec exactly (ac_uid, type, file, status, task_id, hook_check.expected_exit=0, no extra hook_check fields). AC3: ac-07b entry fields all match spec exactly (ac_uid, type, file, status, task_id, hook_check.expected_exit=2, hook_check.expected_stderr_token='bulk-commit-auth-flag-write', no extra hook_check fields). AC4: global manifest task entry confirmed. Original 6 entries (ac-01 through ac-06) unmodified. Both referenced test files confirmed on disk. Codex raised two findings; both evaluated and classified as out_of_scope for this cycle (see codex_consult and out_of_scope_observations).

AC1.evidence: Python JSON parse: len(active_tests) == 8. Confirmed independently via python3 -c 'import json; print(len(json.load(open("tests/generated/20260526-052559/manifest.json"))["active_tests"]))'

All fields match spec exactly.

AC3.evidence: Entry at position 8: ac_id='ac-07b', ac_uid='ac07b-forged-arg-blocked', type='hook', file='tests/generated/20260526-052559/test_ac_07b_ac07b-forged-arg-blocked.py', status='active', task_id='20260526-052559', hook_check={'method':'pytest or bash subprocess','expected_exit':2,'expected_stderr_token':'bulk-commit-auth-flag-write'} — fields=['method','expected_exit','expected_stderr_token'] (no extras). All fields match spec exactly.

AC4.evidence: tests/generated/manifest.json tasks[] contains entry: task_id='20260526-052559', manifest_path='tests/generated/20260526-052559/manifest.json'. No write was performed. Unique entry (no duplicates).

manifest_verification._pytest_failures_scope_note: All 3 pytest failures are due to stale STABLE_STDERR_TOKEN strings in test files written before task 20260526-053746 renamed the token. Fixing test file assertions is in the Won't Have list for this cycle ('Updating any test file contents'). This is a separate follow-up task. The manifest entries themselves are schema-correct — they faithfully mirror what the test files assert.

summary.notes: All 4 ACs pass. Two out_of_scope_observations recorded (stale test tokens, untracked file — both pre-existing and outside this cycle's scope). Codex raised these as blocking but both are correctly classified as out-of-scope per BA spec Won't Have constraints and cleanliness-inspector pre-existing finding.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex raised 2 findings: (1) manifest.json is untracked in git — PROPOSED_FIX: require staging before close-ready. (2) ac-07b test fails at runtime because test asserts 'bulk-commit-auth-flag-write' but hook emits 'bulk-commit-sentinel-write' — PROPOSED_FIX: reconcile token or narrow verdict to 'manifest-shape only'.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Finding 1 (untracked manifest): Classified out_of_scope. The manifest was already untracked at cycle baseline (confirmed in baseline_dirty_snapshot). The 4 ACs contain no git-staging requirement. BA spec Won't Have is silent on tracking. The close-report for the original task already recorded this file as a non-blocking generated artifact. No verdict change. Finding 2 (test failures): Classified out_of_scope. The test file token staleness is a pre-existing issue documented in cleanliness-inspector-report-20260526-202532.json before this cycle ran. Fixing test file assertions is explicitly in the Won't Have list. The manifest entry for ac-07b faithfully mirrors what the test file asserts — the manifest JSON is schema-correct per AC3 spec. A follow-up cycle (or the existing follow-up already noted in the cleanliness report) must update the test assertion strings from 'bulk-commit-auth-flag-write' to 'bulk-commit-sentinel-write'. Verdict unchanged: PASS.
